debug_info.goal:
case cons.cons
a : Type
sl : SymList a
b : a
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
h₁ :
  ((b :: bs).isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1) ∧
    ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → (b :: bs).isEmpty = true ∨ (b :: bs).length = 1)
h : { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := h₁ } ≠ nil
ih₁ :
  ∀ (h₁ : bs = [] → ns = []),
    ¬{ lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
      lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
        { lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL
ih₂ :
  (∀ (h₁ : (bs = [] → ns = [] ∨ ns.length = 1) ∧ (ns = [] → bs = [] ∨ bs.length = 1)),
      ¬{ lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
        lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
          { lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL) →
    ∀ (h₁ : ns = [] → bs = []),
      ¬{ lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
        lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
          { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL
⊢ (if h : ns = [] then splitInTwoSL (b :: bs) else { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }).lhs.length +
      (if h : ns = [] then splitInTwoSL (b :: bs) else { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }).rhs.length <
    bs.length + 1 + (ns.length + 1)

failed_attempts:
split_ifs <;> simp [lengthSL, splitInTwoSL] <;> omega

end SymList

split_ifs with hns
     · simp [splitInTwoSL, *]
       omega
     · simp [*]
       omega

split <;> simp [*, lengthSL, splitInTwoSL, Nat.lt_succ_self]

end SymList

split_ifs <;> simp [*, splitInTwoSL, lengthSL, Nat.lt_succ_self]

end SymList
